title: Come Play With Us
lesson: Inviting someone who is alone to join in makes everyone happier.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a bright playground on a sunny afternoon. The person from the input image stands on the far left tossing a colourful ball, facing the camera with a happy expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} catches the ball, laughing. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, holding the colourful ball in both hands and pausing, facing the camera with a thoughtful, caring expression and the face fully visible, looking toward a bench. In the background on the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} sits alone on a playground bench looking sad and left out. Eye-level medium shot, soft afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the sunny outdoor playground with the slide and swings behind, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks on the far left toward a wooden playground bench, facing the camera with a friendly, encouraging smile and the face fully visible, one hand reaching out in welcome. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} sits looking up hopefully from the wooden playground bench. Bright outdoor daylight, clearly outdoors (no living room, no sofa, no television). Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a kind smile and the face fully visible, holding hands with {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} who stands to the right, now smiling and rising up from the bench. Sunny playground, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A joyful playground scene. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, clapping and laughing as they join the game, facing the camera with a big happy smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} play together with a colourful ball, everyone included. Eye-level medium-wide shot, bright sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left with arms around their friends, facing the camera with a warm, proud smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} grin happily beside them. Golden afternoon light on the playground, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: You were at the playground, tossing a ball with your friend. Catch! You both laughed.
Then you saw a boy sitting all alone on a bench. He looked sad and left out.
You walked right over with a friendly smile. "Come play with us!" you said, reaching out your hand.
His face lit up, and he took your hand and stood. Now he had friends to play with!
Everyone played together with the ball. Nobody was left out, and everyone was happy.
You wrapped your arms around your friends with a proud smile. Including everyone made the best day.
